Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

Class GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder

extends Object

    • Method Detail

      • withStopSequences

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withStopSequences​(List<String> stopSequences)
        Optional. The set of character sequences (up to 5) that will stop output generation. If specified, the API will stop at the first appearance of a stop sequence. The stop sequence will not be included as part of the response.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withResponseMimeType

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withResponseMimeType​(String responseMimeType)
        Optional. Output response mimetype of the generated candidate text. Supported mimetype: `text/plain`: (default) Text output. `application/json`: JSON response to the candidates.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withResponseSchema

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withResponseSchema​(Schema responseSchema)
        Optional. Output response schema of the generated candidate text when a response mime type can have schema. Schema can be objects, primitives or arrays and is a subset of OpenAPI schema.

        If set, a compatible responseMimeType must also be set. Compatible mimetypes: `application/json`: Schema for JSON response.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withCandidateCount

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withCandidateCount​(Integer candidateCount)
        Optional. Number of generated responses to return.

        Currently, this value can only be set to 1. If unset, this will default to 1.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withMaxOutputTokens

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withMaxOutputTokens​(Integer maxOutputTokens)
        Optional. The maximum number of tokens to include in a candidate.

        Note: The default value varies by model, see the Model.output_token_limit attribute of the Model returned from the getModel function.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTemperature

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withTemperature​(Double temperature)
        Optional. Controls the randomness of the output.

        Note: The default value varies by model, see the Model.temperature attribute of the Model returned from the getModel function.

        Values can range from [0.0, 2.0].

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTopP

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withTopP​(Double topP)
        Optional. The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling.

        The model uses combined Top-k and nucleus sampling.

        Tokens are sorted based on their assigned probabilities so that only the most likely tokens are considered. Top-k sampling directly limits the maximum number of tokens to consider, while Nucleus sampling limits the number of tokens based on the cumulative probability.

        Note: The default value varies by model, see the Model.top_p attribute of the Model returned from the getModel function.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTopK

        public GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder withTopK​(Integer topK)
        Optional. The maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling.

        Models use nucleus sampling or combined Top-k and nucleus sampling. Top-k sampling considers the set of topK most probable tokens. Models running with nucleus sampling don't allow topK setting.

        Note: The default value varies by model, see the Model.top_k attribute of the Model returned from the getModel function. Empty topK field in the Model indicates the model doesn't apply top-k sampling and doesn't allow setting topK on requests.

        Returns:
        this.

      • build

        public GenerationConfig build()

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object
